examples.title: Algorithm: Search String
examples.description: Pseudocode for searching a substring within a larger string
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SearchString
INPUT: mainString, searchString
OUTPUT: index of first occurrence, or -1 if not found

BEGIN
 FOR EACH character in mainString
 IF current character matches first character of searchString
 CHECK if remaining characters match
 IF match found, RETURN current index
 RETURN -1
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step pseudocode for searching a substring within a larger string

examples.explanation: Java implementation using the indexOf() method with a specified starting index to search for a substring
